title: Origami waterbomb base
chartDefinition: origamiFoldDiagram — waterbomb base: steps 1-5: diagonal crease, both diagonals, horizontal crease, collapse into flat triangle — valley and mountain folds only
sources: Kindergarten Gifts and Occupations literature — pre-1928 Fröbel tradition; the waterbomb base is a canonical preliminary fold
notes: The waterbomb base is a flat triangular form that pre-creases a square for the waterbomb/balloon, the fish base, and many other models. Steps: fold in half both ways (mountain folds on the vertical and horizontal), fold both diagonals as valley folds, collapse to a flat triangle. All fold types are in the v1 renderer's supported list — mountain, valley, and the 2D collapse.
